logic.title: The Brake System
logic.prompt: Explain how a bicycle brake works using one statement and one question.

creative.title: The Magic Remote
creative.prompt: You find a remote that controls people. What command do you press?

logic.title: Rocket Launch
logic.prompt: List the 5 steps of a rocket launch in order using 'First' and 'Next'.

creative.title: Selene's Morning
creative.prompt: Describe the cat's morning routine from waking up to breakfast.

logic.title: Power Grids
logic.prompt: Identify the subject in: 'The giant solar panels provide energy for the city.'

creative.title: The Gravity Car
creative.prompt: Describe a car that runs on gravity. Make sure your sentences have clear subjects.

logic.title: The Ant Colony
logic.prompt: Read about an ant colony. What is the main lesson they teach about teamwork?

creative.title: The Broken Robot
creative.prompt: Write a story about a robot that refuses to compute. What is the moral?

logic.title: The Hardware Shop
logic.prompt: List three tools used for building a bridge, using commas correctly.

creative.title: The Dragon’s Hoard
creative.prompt: The dragon has gold, pizza, and socks. Describe the hoard.

logic.title: Chemical Reaction
logic.prompt: What happens if you mix baking soda and vinegar? Use 'consequently'.

creative.title: The Giant's Sneeze
creative.prompt: A giant sneezed in the city. Describe the effects of the wind.

logic.title: The Map Project
logic.prompt: Label 3 generic cities (common) and 3 specific ones like 'Xiamen' (proper).

creative.title: The Superhero Alias
creative.prompt: Give a hero a common job but a Proper Name. Describe their day.

logic.title: The Warehouse
logic.prompt: The warehouse has boxes, trucks, and cranes. Describe the inventory.

creative.title: The Monster Party
creative.prompt: Describe a party with many ghosts, witches, and bats.

logic.title: Defining Speed
logic.prompt: Is 'Speed' an object or an idea? Describe how it helps an engine.

creative.title: The Bottle of Bravery
creative.prompt: You find a bottle labeled 'Bravery'. What happens when you drink it?

logic.title: The Automated Factory
logic.prompt: A robot works hard. Describe what 'it' does without repeating 'robot'.

creative.title: The Secret Identity
creative.prompt: Liam and Ollie find a cave. What do 'they' see inside?

logic.title: The Engineer's Tool
logic.prompt: Describe the function of the architect's ruler and the builder's hammer.

creative.title: The Cat's Throne
creative.prompt: Describe Selene's favorite spot in the house.

logic.title: The Piston Motion
logic.prompt: Use 5 strong verbs to describe how an engine moves.

creative.title: The Ninja Escape
creative.prompt: Describe how a ninja moves through the trees using action verbs.

logic.title: Future Tech
logic.prompt: What 'will' computers do in 2050? Use helping verbs correctly.

creative.title: The Time Traveler
creative.prompt: The traveler 'has' seen the dinosaurs. Describe what they saw.

logic.title: The Solar Array
logic.prompt: The panel 'absorbs' light. The panels 'absorb' light. Explain the system.

creative.title: The Alien Band
creative.prompt: The drummer 'hits' the drum. The singers 'shout'. Describe the concert.

logic.title: Evolution of Flight
logic.prompt: How did we fly, how do we fly, and how will we fly?

creative.title: The Ghost of Writing
creative.prompt: Write about what you ate, what you are eating, and what you will eat.

logic.title: The Experiment
logic.prompt: The scientist 'built' a tower and 'saw' it fall. Describe the data.

creative.title: The Lost City
creative.prompt: You 'went' to Atlantis and 'found' a crown. What happened?

logic.title: The Spec Sheet
logic.prompt: Describe a laptop using 5 technical adjectives (e.g., portable, sleek).

creative.title: The Monster’s Buffet
creative.prompt: Describe a gross meal using sensory adjectives.

logic.title: The Precision Drill
logic.prompt: The machine spins 'rapidly' and 'carefully'. Why is this important?

creative.title: The Silent Thief
creative.prompt: How does the thief move through the hall? Use -ly adverbs.

logic.title: CPU Comparison
logic.prompt: Is a phone faster or slower than a PC? Use 'er' and 'est'.

creative.title: The Tallest Tale
creative.prompt: Who is the bravest, tallest, and smartest giant?

logic.title: Logic Gates
logic.prompt: Use 'and', 'but', and 'or' to explain a simple circuit.

creative.title: The Choice Cave
creative.prompt: You can have the gold OR the map, BUT you must choose fast.

logic.title: The Safety Valve
logic.prompt: If the pressure rises, the valve opens. Use 'if' and 'when'.

creative.title: The Invisible Boy
creative.prompt: Because he was invisible, Ollie could eat all the cookies.

logic.title: The Architecture
logic.prompt: Where is the beam? Is it 'above', 'under', or 'between'?

creative.title: The Hide and Seek
creative.prompt: Where is Liam hiding? Use 5 different prepositions.

logic.title: The Expert Opinion
logic.prompt: Quote a scientist saying something about climate change.

creative.title: The Talking Dog
creative.prompt: What does the dog say when it sees a squirrel? Use quotes.

logic.title: The Efficiency Log
logic.prompt: The robot 'don't' like rain. The engine 'won't' stop. Use apostrophes.

creative.title: The Grumpy Troll
creative.prompt: The troll says 'I'm' not sharing 'my' bridge.

logic.title: Property Rights
logic.prompt: Is the patent 'his', 'hers', or 'theirs'?

creative.title: The Loot Bag
creative.prompt: The treasure is 'mine'! No, it is 'ours'!

logic.title: Self-Repairing Bots
logic.prompt: The robot fixed 'itself'. Describe how machines can be autonomous.

creative.title: The Mirror World
creative.prompt: Ollie looked at 'himself' in the magic mirror.

logic.title: The Laboratory Flow
logic.prompt: Use 'In addition' and 'However' to explain an experiment.

creative.title: The Journey Home
creative.prompt: Use 'Meanwhile' and 'Suddenly' to describe a trek.

logic.title: The Patent Filing
logic.prompt: Write a formal email to a boss about a new invention.

creative.title: The Pirate Letter
creative.prompt: Write an informal note to a friend about a buried chest.

logic.title: The Best Power Source
logic.prompt: Solar vs. Wind. Pick one and give 3 logical reasons.

creative.title: The Best Superpower
creative.prompt: Flight vs. Invisibility. Which is better and why?

logic.title: The Factory Floor
logic.prompt: Describe the smells and sounds of a busy factory floor.

creative.title: The Enchanted Forest
creative.prompt: Describe the glowing plants and whispering trees.

logic.title: The How-To Guide
logic.prompt: Explain how to build a paper airplane using technical steps.

creative.title: The Monster Manual
creative.prompt: Write an entry about where a 'Grumble-Wog' lives and what it eats.

logic.title: The Final Blueprint
logic.prompt: Fix 5 spelling errors in a technical report.

creative.title: The Story Polish
creative.prompt: Take your Week 30 story and add 3 more adjectives.
